# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Prevent linkerd authz missing.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing


apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-1
spec:
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-1-authz
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
      services:
      - name: service-a
        namespace: default
    to:
      services:
      - name: service-b
        namespace: default
  portRules:
  - fromPort: 8080
    toPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-2-authz
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
      services:
      - name: service-b
        namespace: default
    to:
      services:
      - name: service-c
        namespace: default
  portRules:
  - fromPort: 8080
    toPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-3-authz
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
      serviceAccounts:
      - namespace: default
        name: sa-a
    to:
      services:
      - name: service-b
        namespace: default
---

  rules:
  - from:
      serviceAccounts:
      - namespace: default
        name: sa-a
    to:
      services:
      - name: service-c
        namespace: default
---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: server-80-authz
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
      services:
      - name: service-b
        namespace: default
    to:
      services:
      - name: service-c
        namespace: default
---
